name: Jester
flavor: You are the chaos at the heart of every encounter. If you can, you avoid fighting, by various means always at hand. The solutions to avoidance are almost limitless. And on the (not so) rare occasion you decide to bleed someone, you make it look like an accident. Because your mind is already so loose and unhinged, it's harder to throw you of ballance. You gain +2 modifier on all sanity checks.

abilities.name: Mocking Cackle
abilities.desc: Your mocking laugh gets under their skin. Target makes a save or cannot attack next turn - too busy fuming, or, worse, giggling. If a target is affected by mocking laugh 3 times consecutively, it start harming itself. The laugh is insuffarable, and it needs to stop. At any cost.

abilities.name: Trick Blade
abilities.desc: A deceptive melee strike, rolled with advantage on attack. If the hit is success, throw a d12. Different rolls have different outcomes.

rows: Deal the base damage of your weapon.
Target starts bleeding, loosing 1hp at the beggining of it's every turn.
The target becomes blind - he can attack only to distance of 3 feet with disadvantage to attack throws.
You deal half of the thrown damage to yourself. (the target still suffers the whole damage).

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.desc: Melt into shadow or a crowd. You become nearly invisible - DC 15 to detect - and can move at half speed while hidden. Breaking into a full sprint ends the effect immediately. All physical cunningness skills recieve +1 modifier.

abilities.name: Pocket of Wonders
abilities.desc: Reach into your endless pockets. Roll a d6 - you never know, what your own pockets can hide.

abilities.name: Jester's Medley
abilities.desc: A performance, a jape, a jest. Inspire one ally - they gain advantage on their next roll. Or: Distract all enemies in sight, they all gain -1 to their next attack throw. Outside of a combat, Jester's Medley causes drawn attention to you. Every mesmerized creature pays almost no attention to what is happening around them.

name: Dreamcaster
flavor: While others don’t understand the world of dreams, you know that it is a silken web that forms the reality in which we live. Dreams are not illusions of the mind - dreams are the fabric of the universe. And you know how to weave it. Into matter, into voices, and visions. Thanks to it, you also know more about people around you they themself might now.

abilities.name: Minor Illusion
abilities.desc: Create a small visual or auditory illusion - a sound, a shadow, a drifting light, a fleeting face in the fog. No larger than a person. No direct combat effect. Limited only by your imagination. You may use this freely, as many times as you wish.

abilities.name: Telepathy
abilities.desc: Reach into a mind within 30 feet. Send a wordless message - emotion, image, intent - silently and instantly. Or read their surface thoughts: what they are focused on right now. The target is unaware in either case.

abilities.name: Mesmerize
abilities.desc: Lock eyes with one target. If they fail their save, they are Charmed for 1 round - they cannot act against you or your allies. They remember being held. They do not know why.

abilities.name: Magic Mouth
abilities.desc: Enchant a surface, object, or humanoid with a stored message. Set a trigger - a specific action which activates your spell. When triggered, a magical mouth delivers your words exactly as you spoke them.

abilities.name: Puppet
abilities.desc: For one terrifying moment, you take the wheel. Force one creature within 30 feet to take a single action of your choosing. They do it. Water it is. They cannot stop it. They know it was you.

name: Ranger
flavor: You read the land. You read the people. Where others are lost, you find the thread. You keep moving. You feel the world and it's needs. Wether it be an animal, a plant or another human. You look beneath the obvious. You are the only one in this world who is still truly looking... Oh, and you are also a therific hunter - of anything that lives.

abilities.name: Precise Shot
abilities.desc: Take careful aim before firing. Your next ranged attack deals 1d10 damage and ignores all cover bonuses. The arrow finds the gap.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.desc: Loose a flurry of arrows at up to 3 different targets simultaneously. Roll separately for each target. Each hit deals 1d6 damage. For one moment, the air is full of fletching.

abilities.name: Roped Shot
abilities.desc: Fire an arrow with a string attached. Immidiately after succesful shot, you can pull the target 3 feets closer. On every next turn, you can try to disballance the target, throwing it onto a ground - until the sting is cut.

abilities.name: Herbalist
abilities.desc: Identify any herb, drink, fruit, insect before it is consumed - its effects, potency, and DC. When you consume a herb, halve chance to a negative effect. You know what grows in this dark, and what it does to people. You can also make ointment and dip your arrows in it - targets of these arrows suffer the cosecvences of that source.

abilities.name: Ranger's Eye
abilities.desc: You always find the trail - footprints, broken stems, magical residue, lingering scent. Hidden paths reveal themselves. Additionally, you sense hidden dangers, traps, and unnatural presences within 30 feet. You feel the wrongness before you can name it. +3 to all Instinct throws for 10 minutes.

abilities.name: Read the Move
abilities.desc: Before a creature takes their action, the Ranger calls it. They declare what they believe the target is about to do. The DM confirms. If correct, the action is interrupted before it resolves: the Ranger acts first - they have few seconds to directly disrupt that action. Being observant paid off.

name: Shapeshifter
flavor: You don’t agree that our physical form should define us. The world is malleable and constantly changing. And you have learned to mimic this ability. You remember every creature, every person. You have observed some for so long that you can take on their form. You can, however, also take on the form of creatures that have not yet been born - your body then becomes a horror in the eyes of others.

abilities.name: Beast Form
abilities.desc: Transform fully into one of four preset forms. You keep your mind, but gain the animal's body, senses, and instincts. Lasts up to 10 minutes. If you can observe something animalistic uninterrupted for 4 hours, you gain the ability to transform into it. You can propose the the movement, attack and special skills, DM approves.

rows: Advantage on attack if an ally is adjacent to the same target. On a critical hit, target falls Prone.
Gain +6 temporary HP on transformation. On a hit, Save: Constitution 12 or target is Grappled.
Advantage on all Instinct at range.
On hit, Save: Constitution 12 or target has -2 to their next roll (venom). Constrict a Grappled target for 1d4/round. Can squeeze through small gaps.

abilities.name: Mimic
abilities.desc: Copy the exact appearance, voice, and mannerisms of any humanoid you have closely observed. The better you observe your target, the easier your constitution check becomes. Others must make a DC 14 Insight check to notice something is off. A perfect copy - down to the nervous habit.

abilities.name: Partial Shift + Predator Sense
abilities.desc: Grow one animal feature - claws (1d6 melee), gills, a prehensile tail, or a climbing grip - and simultaneously borrow a set of animal senses: echolocation, heat-sight, a wolf's nose, or an owl's night-vision. You cannot be surprised while active. You can only grow something you have observed through your own eyes. You cannot grow dragon wings by only hearing a tale of a dragon.

abilities.name: Regenerate
abilities.desc: Shift your flesh to push out damage and knit wounds shut. Your body ripples briefly, disturbingly - then settles back to normal. Ragain back some lost life as your flesh grows back. 2d4+2.

abilities.name: Grotesque Form
abilities.desc: Shift into something wrong. Limbs too many, eyes too wide, angles that shouldn't exist. All enemies who can see you must save or be Disturbed and Frightened for 1 round - they cannot move toward you and have -2 to all rolls. Your allies are unaffected.

name: Sorcerer
flavor: You were born with a unique sensitivity to the energies of the universe - energies that others perceive merely as wind or heat. You know that all matter carries energy, which gives it its very essence. You have the ability to absorb and transform this energy - into tangible magic or a force capable of causing harm. Everything you do carries a cost - and sometimes, so does everyone standing near you.

abilities.name: Hex
abilities.desc: Curse an enemy with magical affliction. They have disadvantage - roll twice, take the worse result - on all their rolls for 1 full round.

abilities.name: Arcing Bolt
abilities.desc: Launch a bolt that leaps between enemies. It hunts. Roll to hit the first target (1d10 on hit). The bolt then automatically jumps to the nearest enemy within 10 feet (1d6), then once more (1d4). It cannot return to a previously struck target.

abilities.name: Void Touch
abilities.desc: Reach out by hand. The air around a target compresses with vicious invisible force. On hit: 2d4 force damage. Target starts wandering aimlessly for 2 turns. It's mind is empty. Or full of eternity. Who knows...

abilities.name: Gravity well
abilities.desc: Release a burst of volatile magic - uncontrolled, indiscriminate. All creatures within 15 feet, including allies, must save (Constitution) or start floating (15 feet high). Floating creatures cannot attack or cast spells. They can swim in air 3 feet per turn. After 3 turns, creatures fall. Before you use it, roll d4: on a 1, you are caught in your own blast as well and must save against your own DC.

abilities.name: Arcane Fortress
abilities.desc: Summon a solid 2×2×2 cube of shimmering force anywhere you can see. It is real and physical. Creatures may stand inside it (full cover from ranged attacks), stand on top, or be blocked entirely by its walls. Lasts until dismissed or you fall unconscious.

abilities.name: Foreign Limb
abilities.desc: Create a limb - a hand or a leg. You probabbly stole it from someone in another dimension. This limb can fly and interact with objects. It cannot push or lift anything heavier than 3kg. The caster must see it to control it. It glows brightly, like a moonshine.

abilities.name: Dissolve
abilities.desc: By understanding it's energy, transform any object into something completly different - it must have roughly the same weight and size. Or, make it dissolve completly - into pure energy. Which you drain, as it heals your mind - throw 1d8 and regain 1 sanity if you throw 8. You cannot recreate something mindless into something mindfull and vice versa. You powers have limits.
